title: phleum subulatum subsp. ciliatum
intro: Phleum subulatum subsp. ciliatum, also known as tufted hair grass, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phleum subulatum subsp. ciliatum include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to relieve symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats.
